name: WW Apple and Cheddar Corn Muffins
recipeIngredient: Cherri Langley RVSN34B (2 1/4 oz) Cheddar, reduced-fat, shredded cheese
3/4 pound Apples, cored, peeled, finely chopped (about weight before cutting)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F. Line a 12 muffin pan with paper baking cups.
2. In a large bowl, combine flour, cornmeal, and baking powder. Add apples, corn, cheese, sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg; stir to combine.
3. In a small bowl, beat eggs and oil; stir into the flour mixture (do not overbeat). The mixture will be stiff.
4. Fill muffin cups about 2/3 full with batter.
5. Bake in the center of the oven for 15 minutes. Makes 12 muffins. Each serving is approximately: 1 1/2 F, 1/2 P, 1 B, 1/4 F, 25 calories.
